days.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Design, a new product for generating designs, prototypes, slides, and one-pagers with Claude, extending the company from chat and coding into visual creation workflows. ByteDance Seed also surfaced multiple concrete model artifacts — Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM — while Baidu’s open-weight ERNIE-Image claimed state-of-the-art text-to-image performance with an 8B-parameter DiT, signaling continued competition in multimodal foundation models.
